title: Cecily Parsley
content:
Cecily Parsley lived in a pen,
    And brewed good ale for gentlemen;

    Gentlemen came every day,
    Till Cecily Parsley ran away.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Helen Beatrix Potter delivers a powerful performance in "Cecily Parsley"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
